NavCompound

Sidebar navigation with expand and collapse toggle, nav items, pinned and chat sections, split items, me control, and notification badge.

Nav — Component Preview

Click the Copilot icon to toggle expanded/collapsed. Click nav items to toggle selected. Hover for hover state.
